body:
APPROVE
The implementation satisfies the stated US-099 acceptance criteria with global layout wiring, accessible command roles, debounced GraphQL search, click activation, bead-context actions, and preserved project routing. I could not rerun Playwright in this sandbox because localhost binding is denied, but the execution evidence records the exact palette spec passing 6/6.
